trigger_condition.note: Optimal f values decrease as sigma bounds widen: 3σ→0.206, 4σ→0.158, 5σ→0.126, 6σ→0.104, 10σ→0.053

sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f sizing with sigma-based probability bounds. Position size = optimal_f_multiplier × account_equity, where f decreases inversely with widening confidence intervals (3 to 10 sigmas).

source_rule_text: Position sizing based on cumulative probability bounds expressed in standard deviations, with optimal f values decreasing as probability bounds widen from 3 to 10 sigmas.
